svg.title: Evidence screenshot placeholder
svg.desc: Placeholder frame for screenshots of dmesg, bpftrace, and blocked versus bypassed download evidence.
svg.text: Replace this image with one of the following:

g.text: 1. bpftrace showing ds_am.init executing rmmod bmhook and rmmod tmhook
2. dmesg showing tmhook livepatch unpatching, unloaded, loaded, patching complete
3. Normal blocked download compared with successful download during the reload window
4. PoC output showing bmhook=0 or tmhook=0 and window_seen=1

svg.text: Tip: keep screenshots timestamped so the unload window can be correlated across bpftrace, dmesg, and agent logs.
